ValidationRule.description: Manged By should be Andrew Spinks
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Requested')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Open')), $Profile.Id = '00e0o000002Ft7k', NOT( Managed_By__r.CommunityNickname = 'andrew.spinks') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Managed By should be Andrew Spinks. Please update
